_meta.what: Curated 'Highlights of Lessons' — title / theme / learning objectives / grammar points, keyed by unit (B1L01 .. B6L10). Drives the lesson viewer and any objective-shaped generation.
_meta.source: Each book's textbook PDF front matter, 'Highlights of Lessons' table. CORRECTED 2026-07-01: B1=PDF p19; B3=PDF p19-23 (verified directly via Read tool pages= on the table images — the old 'p7' note was wrong, p7 is just the table of contents; raw-bN.txt's extract heuristic grabs the TOC hit, not the real table). B2 presumably also ~p19+ (its 15 lessons were already curated+verified separately). B4 = Highlights at PDF pp.20-21 (printed XVIII-XIX); NO text layer, vision-read off page images; L01-04 done; B5 page unverified — re-check before trusting 'p7'; B6 = textbook PDF absent from private/dangdai-pdfs/.
_meta.extract: raw-bN.txt from extract_highlights.py is unreliable (locates the TOC, not the table) — go straight to Read tool with pages=19,20,21... on the real (non-Workbook) textbook PDF and verify the 'Highlights of Lessons' / 各課重點 banner before transcribing.
_meta.vocab_note: Vocab is NOT here — it comes from the dangdai deck (private/dangdai-vocab/dangdai.csv) and already spans all 6 books (74 lessons).
_meta.grammar_shape: Each grammar point: {title, g} plus a detector — m (single marker substring) | any (present if any listed) | re (regex, for two-blank patterns like 不但...還...) | pat ('anota' = A-not-A regex, 'v1v' = V-one-V regex).
_meta.todo: Promote B4 (locate Highlights page) + B5 (re-verify page) from the textbook PDFs; obtain B6 textbook PDF. B1-B3 verified.
